description: Comprehensive test suite for iteration 11-14: behavioral tests, property-based Kelly tests, ticker parsing fuzz tests, and integration tests for all new features
steps: 1. Create tests/test_iteration11.py with the following test classes and methods:

2. TestCoordinatorWeights class: test_sector_aware_boost_technology (verify tech sector boosts cathie_wood/aschenbrenner/thiel weights), test_sector_aware_boost_financials (verify financial sector boosts buffett/graham/marks), test_diversity_penalty_never_negative (verify penalty stays >= 0.3), test_rolling_ic_weights_normalized (verify normalization before blending), test_consensus_score_always_clamped (verify score in [0,10] range)

3. TestDataPipelineResilience class: test_fetch_with_none_values (mock yfinance returning None for some fields, verify no crash), test_crypto_ticker_format (verify BTC-USD passes validation), test_international_ticker_format (verify 0700.HK, 2330.TW pass validation), test_cache_thread_safety (use concurrent.futures to hammer cache from multiple threads), test_partial_data_graceful (mock stock.info with missing keys)

4. TestConfigValidation class: test_validate_config_valid (valid config passes without warnings), test_validate_config_invalid_per_agent (non-dict per_agent triggers warning), test_validate_config_invalid_defaults (non-dict defaults triggers warning), test_persona_yaml_invalid_weights_range (weights > 1.0 rejected), test_persona_yaml_invalid_agent_id (spaces/special chars rejected)
5. TestRateLimiting class: test_rate_limit_allows_normal_traffic (29 requests pass), test_rate_limit_blocks_excess (31 requests to same ticker returns 429 on 31st)

6. TestKellyProperty class: test_kelly_always_non_negative (property test: for random score/confidence combos, position_pct >= 0), test_kelly_max_20_percent (property test: position never exceeds 20%), test_kelly_bearish_always_zero (bearish signal always gives 0% position), test_kelly_bullish_minimum_floor (bullish + conf>=0.5 gives at least 1%)

7. TestTickerParsing class: test_valid_tickers_accepted (AAPL, BRK.B, BTC-USD, 0700.HK all pass regex), test_invalid_tickers_rejected (SQL injection, path traversal, empty string, too-long strings rejected), test_unicode_ticker_rejected (Chinese/Japanese chars rejected)

8. TestResponsiveCSS class: test_css_has_tablet_breakpoint (grep for 1024px media query), test_css_has_focus_visible (grep for :focus-visible), test_css_has_table_responsive (grep for .table-responsive)
acceptance_criteria: All new tests in test_iteration11.py pass
Kelly property tests use at least 100 random inputs each
Ticker fuzz tests cover SQL injection, path traversal, unicode, and boundary cases
Thread safety test uses at least 10 concurrent threads
Total test count increases by 25+ new tests
findings: All 41 new tests pass. Full suite (342 tests) passes with no regressions. Used sys.modules patch for scanner.rolling_ic mock since it is imported inside try/except block. Rate limit tests use auto_fetch=false to avoid yfinance calls.
